creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

As it stands, this PR is missing a whole bucketload of information 
for a port update.  You cannot simply just bump the PORTVERSION. 

At a minimum, files/md5 will also need to be updated, and you may 
need to make modifications to the patches and PLIST for any 
updates that have occurred. 

Please submit a unified diff to fully update the port, and it will 
stand a much better chance of being committed.
